description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof in dark gray with a prominent chimney on one side, evoking a traditional European or Tudor style. The facade is adorned with timber framing in a reddish-brown color, contrasting with the cream-colored wall panels. The front elevation includes a decorative lattice window above a wooden door with an angular design, flanked by timber posts. Both side walls have small, square lattice windows and exposed timber beams under the eaves, adding to the rustic charm. The rear of the house is simpler, with no door and minimal ornamentation, but maintains the same timber and plaster aesthetic. The overall structure is compact, with a single story and a visually cohesive, storybook appearance.
description: A compact, timber-framed house with a steep gable roof, lattice windows, and a decorative wooden door, evoking a traditional European cottage style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, decorative lattice window above, and prominent timber framing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two small lattice windows, exposed beams, and the chimney on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain wall, timber framing, and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two lattice windows and exposed beams, mirroring the other side but without the chimney.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical lattice windows on sides, large decorative window above entry
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with angular design, no steps or porch, decorative timber framing and lattice window above
